crosspostAuthoritySubreddit.label: Crosspost Authority Subreddit
crosspostAuthoritySubreddit.helpText: Only this installation context ingests crosspost wiki revisions.

crosspostMaxSourcePostAgeMinutes.label: Max Source Post Age for Crosspost (minutes)
crosspostMaxSourcePostAgeMinutes.helpText: Skip crossposting source posts older than this age.

crosspostIngestionEnabled.label: Enable Crosspost Ingestion
crosspostIngestionEnabled.helpText: Disable to stop all wiki-driven crosspost ingestion.

crosspostMaxRevisionAgeMinutes.label: Max Wiki Revision Age (minutes)
crosspostMaxRevisionAgeMinutes.helpText: Skip revisions older than this age.

maxCrosspostsPerRun.label: Max Crossposts Per Run
maxCrosspostsPerRun.helpText: Hard cap for crossposts created in one ingestion run.

items.label: Sub Goal - Create a New Goal
items.description: Create a new subscriber goal post

items.label: Sub Goal - Delete This Goal
items.description: Delete the current subscriber goal post

items.label: Sub Goal - Erase a User's Data
items.description: Erase subscriber data for a specific user
